settings.subtitle: Pleasure is the point. Your scent is honey and butter and slow Sundays — comfort dialled to its richest setting.

settings.content: You don't ration. You don't apologise. The good thing is for taking, slowly, until the room is yours.
Hot chocolate, warm bread, the second helping. Fragrance as something you can almost taste.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Indulger lives in gourmand territory — vanilla, tonka, praline, caramelised woods, honey, fig. Fragrances that wrap rather than project, that invite leaning in. Decadence without irony. The closest a scent can come to a kept secret.

settings.title: The | Indulger's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes that wrap, comfort, and stay.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
